[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../index.md) / [config/app/app-config](../index.md) / AppConfig

# AppConfig

> **Configuration Layer**

Defined in: [src/app/config/app/app-config.ts:56](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/config/app/app-config.ts#L56)

Effect [Effect.Service](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) that provides typed, validated application
configuration for the MCP server.

## Remarks

The service is registered under the tag `"AppConfig"` and constructed
via an [Effect.gen](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) block that yields three configuration values:

| Key              | Accessor                                             | Default         | Description                                                 |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| `SERVER_NAME`    | [Config.string](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) | `"coffee-mate"` | Human-readable server identity sent during MCP `initialize` |
| `SERVER_VERSION` | [Config.string](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) | `"1.0.0"`       | Semver version reported to MCP clients                      |
| `PORT`           | [Config.number](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) | `3001`          | TCP port for the HTTP transport                             |

The returned object is narrowed with `as const` so that each property
retains its literal type at the call site.

Provide the service via `AppConfig.Default` (which uses the ambient
`ConfigProvider`) or swap in a custom `ConfigProvider` for
testing.

## Example

```ts
import { Effect } from "effect";
import { AppConfig } from "./app-config.js";

const program = Effect.gen(function* () {
  const config = yield* AppConfig;
  console.log(config.name, config.port);
});

await Effect.runPromise(program.pipe(Effect.provide(AppConfig.Default)));
```

## Extends

- {
  `name`: `string`;
  `version`: `string`;
  `port`: `number`;
  } & {
  `_tag`: `"AppConfig"`;
  }

#### Returns

`AppConfig`

#### Inherited from

```ts
Effect.Service<AppConfig>()("AppConfig", {
	effect: Effect.gen(function () {
		const name = yield Config.string("SERVER_NAME").pipe(
			Config.withDefault("coffee-mate"),
		);
		const version = yield Config.string("SERVER_VERSION").pipe(
			Config.withDefault("1.0.0"),
		);
		const port = yield Config.number("PORT").pipe(
			Config.withDefault(3001),
		);
		return { name, version, port } as const;
	}),
}).constructor
```
